Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Algorithm Visualizer 106 upvotes, 5 comments
  2. Fun with CSF firmware (RK3588 GPU firmware) 30 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Intel Device Modeling Language for virtual platforms 32 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. A Compiler Writing Journey 80 upvotes, 7 comments
  5. Show HN: DuckDB community extension for prefiltered HNSW using ACORN-1 51 upvotes, 4 comments
  6. Show HN: I took back Video.js after 16 years and we rewrote it to be 88% smaller 409 upvotes, 82 comments
  7. TurboQuant: Redefining AI efficiency with extreme compression 169 upvotes, 34 comments
  8. Show HN: Email.md – Markdown to responsive, email-safe HTML 296 upvotes, 70 comments
  9. Show HN: Gemini can now natively embed video, so I built sub-second video search 332 upvotes, 91 comments
  10. Flighty Airports 331 upvotes, 104 comments
  11. Wine 11 rewrites how Linux runs Windows games at kernel with massive speed gains 948 upvotes, 335 comments
  12. An Aural Companion for Decades, CBS News Radio Crackles to a Close 57 upvotes, 13 comments
  13. Meta told to pay $375M for misleading users over child safety 14 upvotes, 1 comments
  14. The Last Testaments of Richard II and Henry IV 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  15. Hypothesis, Antithesis, synthesis 251 upvotes, 86 comments
  16. How the world’s first electric grid was built 93 upvotes, 29 comments
  17. Hypura – A storage-tier-aware LLM inference scheduler for Apple Silicon 206 upvotes, 77 comments
  18. I wanted to build vertical SaaS for pest control, so I took a technician job 308 upvotes, 125 comments
  19. VNDB founder Yorhel has died 31 upvotes, 7 comments
  20. Looking at Unity made me understand the point of C++ coroutines 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  21. Apple Business 635 upvotes, 363 comments
  22. VitruvianOS – Desktop Linux Inspired by the BeOS 147 upvotes, 74 comments
  23. Tell HN: Litellm 1.82.7 and 1.82.8 on PyPI are compromised 688 upvotes, 429 comments
  24. You can run a DNS server (2025) 81 upvotes, 42 comments
  25. Goodbye to Sora 732 upvotes, 526 comments
  26. What happened to GEM? 78 upvotes, 44 comments
  27. Why I forked httpx 91 upvotes, 54 comments
  28. Arm AGI CPU 352 upvotes, 261 comments
  29. Missile defense is NP-complete 338 upvotes, 346 comments
  30. In Edison’s Revenge, Data Centers Are Transitioning From AC to DC 136 upvotes, 170 comments

Last generated 6:30pm, 25 March 2026. Source here.
